name: Select Federal Credit Union
description_short: Select Federal Credit Union is a payday alternative lending provider based in San Antonio, Texas. Rated 3.3/5 with 49 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Select Federal Credit Union is a payday alternative lending provider serving clients in San Antonio, Texas. Carrying a 3.3/5.0 Google rating from 49 reviews, Select Federal Credit Union has an mixed reputation among consumers in the San Antonio area looking to find affordable alternatives to traditional payday loans.

Operating as a atm, bank, credit union, Select Federal Credit Union provides a range of services for consumers seeking payday alternative lending solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Payday alternative providers in San Antonio offer consumers a way to access short-term funds without the high costs typically associated with traditional payday loans. Select Federal Credit Union operates in a space where regulation varies by state, and consumers should verify that any lender they work with is properly licensed. Key factors to compare include interest rates, loan limits, repayment terms, and whether the provider reports to credit bureaus.

Consumers in the San Antonio, Texas area who are considering Select Federal Credit Union should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any payday alternative lending provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
